history.content:
CURRENT OBSERVATION:
#####
#>..#
#.L.#
#.LG#
#####

<thought>
I am facing right and there is open floor ahead. The goal is down and to the right, and moving forward keeps me on a safe path while avoiding the lava below for now.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

CURRENT OBSERVATION:
#####
#.>.#
#.L.#
#.LG#
#####

<thought>
I am facing right toward an empty cell, but the goal is below and to the right. Moving forward would not help, and turning right would face lava. Turning left will face upward, which is also not useful yet, but it is the safer first step to reorient toward navigating around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

#.L.#
#.LG#

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

</action>
